168	
169	## Phase 2 — Stability, Persistence & Iteration 2 Fixes
170	
171	### 2.1 State Persistence Across Navigation
172	
173	**Problem:** User parameters (key, mode, settings) drop when navigating between document and sandbox pages.
174	
175	**Fix:** Move `key`, `mode`, `rhythmDensity`, `pickupBeats` from local component state into a persistent Zustand store (likely `useDocumentStore.ts` or `useUploadStore.ts`). Confirm these stores use `persist` middleware. If not, add `persist` with `localStorage` as storage.
176	
177	**Files:** Locate `useUploadStore.ts` or `useDocumentStore.ts`; confirm or add `persist` middleware from `zustand/middleware`.
178	
179	### 2.2 Anacrusis/Pickup Measure Support
180	
181	**Problem:** System treats pickup measures as full measures, causing misaligned harmonic rhythm.
182	
183	**UI fix:** Add a "Pickup beats" numeric input (0–3) to the document configuration page. Wire to `set_pickup_beats` intent (already exists in `intentRouter.ts`). This value passes to the backend generation endpoint.
184	
185	**Files:** `frontend/src/app/document/page.tsx` — add pickup beats field to the pre-generation settings form.
186	
187	### 2.3 Rest Placeholders on Note Deletion
188	
189	**Problem:** Deleting a note leaves visual gaps instead of rests.
190	
191	**Fix:** In the note deletion handler (locate in `ScoreEditor.tsx` or note mutation utils), after removing a note, insert a rest of equal duration at the same position. This is a frontend symbolic edit — produces a rest note object in the `EditableScore` JSON.
192	
193	### 2.4 Plain-Language Terminology
194	
195	**Replace these terms universally:**
196	| Current | Replace with |
197	|---|---|
198	| "SATB" | "4-part harmony" (with tooltip: "Soprano, Alto, Tenor, Bass") |
199	| "backing chords" | "accompaniment chords" |
200	| "portal / mixed / flowing" | "chordal (slow) / mixed / flowing (active)" with brief musical description |
201	| "harmonic rhythm" | "chord change speed" (in UI labels; preserve in Theory Inspector explanations) |
202	
203	Apply via global find-replace in all UI label strings, NOT in AI prompts or music theory explanations.
204	
205	### 2.5 Rhythmic Complexity Control
206	
207	**Add:** Radio/toggle in document page pre-generation settings: "Rhythmic style: Chordal (whole/half notes) | Mixed | Flowing (quarter/eighth notes)". Maps to existing `set_rhythm_density` intent value.
208	
209	### 2.6 Theory Inspector Responsive Design
210	
211	**Fix:** Ensure the panel's scroll container (`overflow-y-auto`) applies only to the tab body, not the entire panel. Header and tab bar must be sticky (`sticky top-0`). Input bar must be sticky bottom. Confirm `max-h` is set relative to viewport, not fixed px.
212	
213	### 2.7 MIDI Playback Stability
214	
215	**Investigate:** Locate Tone.js playback initialization in `frontend/src/hooks/usePlayback.ts` or equivalent. Common fixes:
216	- Ensure `Tone.start()` is called inside a user gesture handler, not on mount
217	- Ensure master volume is set to audible level (e.g., `Tone.Destination.volume.value = -6`)
218	- Add try/catch around `Transport.start()` to prevent crashes from propagating to UI
219	
220	---
221	
222	## Phase 3 — Context-Aware Analysis & Localized Editing (Iteration 3)
223	
224	### 3.1 Context-Aware Chord Analysis
225	
226	**Problem:** Theory Inspector analyzes chords in isolation — misses ii-V-I cadences, tritone subs, sequential voice motion.
227	
228	**Fix** (`prompts.ts` → `buildSystemPrompt()`):
229	- Add "Progression Window" section to system prompt: when `inspectorScoreFocus` contains a note, include the 3 slots before and after in the FACT block.
230	- Add prompt instruction: "Evaluate harmonic function sequentially. Identify the cadential pattern (authentic, half, deceptive, plagal). Identify any tritone substitutions or secondary dominants before commenting on individual pitches."
231	- This requires `buildProgressionWindowFacts()` (already exists in `noteExplainContext.ts`) to be included in every tutor call, not just note-explain calls.
232	
233	### 3.2 Localized Highlight-to-Generate
234	
235	**Scope constraint:** Classical-only baseline. No jazz or pop genre scope for this feature.
236	
237	**UI:** Add "Regenerate this bar" button on measure focus card (already has `onEditFocusedRegion` prop). When clicked, sends a localized regeneration request to backend with measure index + current notes as constraints. Backend scope: separate endpoint or flag on existing generation endpoint — frontend only wires the UI and passes `{ measureIndex, lockedPitches }`.
238	
239	**Frontend changes only:**
240	- Render "Regenerate this bar" button in measure focus card view in Explanation tab
241	- Pass `measureIndex` and current note pitches as payload to `onEditFocusedRegion()` callback
242	- Backend implementation out of scope for frontend phase
243	
244	### 3.3 Expressive Sovereignty Boundary
245	
246	**Rule:** The frontend must never insert dynamic markings, articulations, phrasing slurs, staccatos, or legatos programmatically. Confirm no such insertions exist in score mutation utilities. Add a lint-comment guard where relevant.
247	
248	---
249	
250	## Phase 4 — Discoverability & Navigation (Iteration 4)
251	
252	### 4.1 Navigational Discoverability
253	
254	**Fix:** Rename the document tab/link to "Edit Configuration" or "Settings". Update all navigation labels referencing the document page. Add a visible "← Back to Editor" button in the sandbox header when arriving from document page.
255	
256	**Files:** `frontend/src/app/sandbox/page.tsx` (header nav), `frontend/src/app/document/page.tsx` (back link).
257	
258	### 4.2 Interactive Affordances Onboarding
259	
260	**Fix:** On first sandbox load (tracked via `localStorage` flag `hf_onboarding_seen`), show a 3-step tooltip overlay:
261	1. "Click any note to get an AI explanation" (points to first note)
262	2. "Drag notes to move them" (points to score canvas)
263	3. "Open Theory Inspector to chat with your AI tutor" (points to inspector toggle)
264	
265	Overlay dismisses on "Got it" click. Never shown again after dismissal.
266	
267	**Files:** Create `frontend/src/components/molecules/OnboardingOverlay.tsx`. Mount in `sandbox/page.tsx` conditionally.
268	
269	### 4.3 Tactile Feedback
270	
271	- Every note click must produce an immediate visual state change (selected ring, color shift) within one render frame — no perceptible lag.
272	- If a click fails to register (interaction glitch), show a subtle toast: "Tap a note to select it."
273	
274	---
275	
276	## Phase 5 — Accessibility & Inclusion (Iteration 5)
277	
278	### 5.1 Plain-Language Theory Translations
279	
280	**Explanation level already exists** (`explanationLevel: "beginner" | "intermediate" | "professional"`). Enforce in UI:
281	- Default explanation level to `"beginner"` for new sessions (currently unknown default — confirm in store init).
282	- Display the level selector prominently in the Theory Inspector header (B / I / P pill toggle, already present per architecture report).
283	- In `prompts.ts`: strengthen beginner-level prompt rules — "Use no academic terminology without immediately defining it in parentheses."
284	
285	### 5.2 Progressive Disclosure & Reset
286	
287	**Add:** "Reset workspace" button in sandbox header (next to "Edit Configuration"). Clicking shows a confirmation modal: "This will clear all edits and return to the last generated score." On confirm: reload from `useUploadStore` baseline.
288	
289	**Add:** Collapsible "Advanced settings" section in document page that hides pickup beats, rhythmic density, and genre behind a disclosure toggle. Default: collapsed.
290	
291	### 5.3 Instrument Selection Clarification
292	
293	**Instrument setup page (document page):**
294	- Group instruments by family: Strings, Woodwinds, Brass, Voices
295	- Add instrument icon (already have SVG files in `frontend/public/instruments/`)
296	- Add brief descriptor under each name: e.g., "Violin I — high strings, melody lead"
297	- Future: auditory preview (out of scope for this phase — mark with `// TODO: audio preview`)
298	
299	### 5.4 Trackpad & Keyboard Optimization
300	
301	- Ensure all drag interactions have keyboard equivalents: arrow keys move selected note by semitone (up/down) or beat position (left/right)
302	- Add `touch-action: none` on score canvas to prevent scroll interference during drag on trackpad
303	- Implement tap-to-select (single tap) vs tap-to-move (tap selected note then tap destination) as alternative to drag
304

308

310	1. Open sandbox → Theory Inspector panel shows two tabs ("Explanation" / "Chat")

---

# HarmonyForge: 5-Phase Implementation Plan (Iterations 1–5)

## Context

Five rounds of user studies surfaced a consistent pattern: the system's core music engine is trusted, but the interface creates cognitive overload, discoverability failures, and fragile state. The Theory Inspector is simultaneously the most valued and most confusing component. Phase 1 includes the Theory Inspector tab redesign as its architectural foundation — all downstream inspector work depends on the new layout.

---

## Critical Files (All Phases)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `TheoryInspectorPanel.tsx` | Primary UI organism — all tab work lives here |
| `useTheoryInspector.ts` | Data binding, API streaming, AI tag generation |
| `useTheoryInspectorStore.ts` | Zustand state — add tab state, tag state |
| `sandbox/page.tsx` | Integration point |
| `QuickReplyChips.tsx` | Reuse for starter tags strip |
| `ViolationCard.tsx` | Moves to Explanation tab only |
| `prompts.ts` | Add tag-generation prompt block |
| `/api/theory-inspector/route.ts` | Tags piggyback on streaming response |

---

## Phase 1 — Theory Inspector Tab Redesign + Iteration 1 Fixes

### 1.1 Two-Tab Layout
- Add `activeTab: "explanation" | "chat"` to store (default: `"explanation"`)
- Pill-style toggle buttons at top of panel body
- **Explanation tab:** This Note card → Rationale → Tutor Summary → Ideas to Try Next → Violation cards → Suggestion cards. **No input field.**
- **Chat tab:** Message list → Tag strip → Input field + Send

### 1.2 "This Note" Visual Distinction
- `border-l-4 border-primary bg-zinc-800/60 rounded-r-md` card
- Tutor Summary and Ideas to Try Next: flat, `bg-transparent`, muted uppercase label only — no border

### 1.3 Quick Edits — Explanation Tab Only
- IdeaAction accept/reject buttons stay in the Explanation tab's "Ideas to Try Next" section only. No duplication in chat.

### 1.4 Starter Tags (Chat Tab)
- Seed tags hardcoded: `["Why this note?", "Check my voice leading", "Suggest a passing chord", "What else fits here?", "Show voice motion"]`
- After each AI response, parse `<<<TAGS>>>["tag1","tag2"]<<<END_TAGS>>>` block from stream → `store.addTags()` (deduped, max 8 total; oldest non-seed tags drop first)
- Add `chatTags`, `removeTag`, `addTags` to store
- Tag strip: horizontal scroll, collapses when empty, `×` removes permanently

### 1.5 Remaining Iteration 1 Fixes
- LLM verbosity: enforce max 3–5 bullets, no prose paragraphs in tutor persona
- Toolbar: add visible text labels beneath icon buttons
- Cursor affordances: `cursor-pointer`/`cursor-grab` on note SVG elements

---

## Phase 2 — Stability, Persistence & Iteration 2 Fixes

- **2.1 State Persistence:** Move `key`, `mode`, `rhythmDensity`, `pickupBeats` into persistent Zustand store with `persist` middleware (`localStorage`)
- **2.2 Anacrusis Support:** "Pickup beats" (0–3) numeric input on document page, wired to `set_pickup_beats` intent
- **2.3 Rest Placeholders:** On note deletion, insert rest of equal duration at same position
- **2.4 Terminology:** Replace "SATB" → "4-part harmony", "backing chords" → "accompaniment chords", "portal/mixed/flowing" → "chordal (slow) / mixed / flowing (active)" — in UI labels only, not AI prompts
- **2.5 Rhythmic Complexity:** Radio toggle on document page: Chordal | Mixed | Flowing
- **2.6 Responsive Design:** Scroll container on tab body only; header + tab bar sticky top; input bar sticky bottom
- **2.7 MIDI Stability:** `Tone.start()` inside user gesture handler; master volume at `-6dB`; try/catch around `Transport.start()`

---

## Phase 3 — Context-Aware Analysis & Localized Editing (Iteration 3)

- **3.1 Context-Aware Chord Analysis:** Include 3 slots before/after in FACT block; prompt instructs sequential cadential pattern identification (authentic, half, deceptive, plagal) before commenting on isolated pitches. Reuse existing `buildProgressionWindowFacts()`.
- **3.2 Localized Highlight-to-Generate:** "Regenerate this bar" button on measure focus card; passes `{ measureIndex, lockedPitches }` to `onEditFocusedRegion()`. Classical-only scope. Backend endpoint out of scope for this phase.
- **3.3 Expressive Sovereignty:** Audit score mutation utilities — confirm zero programmatic insertion of dynamics, articulations, slurs, staccatos, legatos.

---

## Phase 4 — Discoverability & Navigation (Iteration 4)

- **4.1 Navigation:** Rename document link to "Edit Configuration"; add "← Back to Editor" in sandbox header
- **4.2 Onboarding Overlay:** 3-step tooltip on first sandbox load (gated by `hf_onboarding_seen` localStorage flag). New component: `OnboardingOverlay.tsx`
- **4.3 Tactile Feedback:** Note selection state change within one render frame; toast fallback if click fails to register

---

## Phase 5 — Accessibility & Inclusion (Iteration 5)

- **5.1 Plain-Language:** Default explanation level to `"beginner"`; beginner prompt rule: define every academic term inline in parentheses
- **5.2 Progressive Disclosure + Reset:** "Reset workspace" button → confirmation modal → reloads from `useUploadStore` baseline. Advanced settings in document page behind a collapsible disclosure, collapsed by default.
- **5.3 Instrument Selection:** Group by family (Strings / Woodwinds / Brass / Voices); use existing SVGs from `frontend/public/instruments/`; add one-line descriptors
- **5.4 Trackpad + Keyboard:** Arrow keys move selected note by semitone; `touch-action: none` on canvas; tap-to-select + tap-to-move as drag alternative

---
